mp.name: Delkar Kalaben Mohanbhai
mp.state: dadra and nagar haveli and daman and diu

qualitative_assessment: MP Delkar Kalaben Mohanbhai shows a moderate transparency profile with significant gaps in key areas. While maintaining perfect criminal record transparency and strong attendance/participation rates, critical deficiencies exist in committee involvement, legislative activity, and public accessibility. The low data confidence (14%) and multiple validation flags suggest incomplete information availability.
key_finding: Moderate transparency with strong attendance but weak committee/legislative record
